nodes.label: stage-many.gif: Demo of staging multiple files at once
nodes.description: Animated GIF showing the dragit git staging UI. Displays an 'Unstaged Changes' section with a badge count of 7 and a hand/cursor icon, listing files: README.md (./), models.ts (./src/api), branches.ts (./src/api/queries), app.tsx (partially visible). Below is a 'Staged Changes' section with count 0 showing 'No files with staged changes found.' The GIF demonstrates bulk/batch staging of multiple files via the header or badge interaction pattern. Dark theme UI.
